idea-plugin.name: IDEA Merge CLI Fixer
idea-plugin.description:
Adds the idea mergex CLI command — a blocking, git-mergetool-friendly variant of idea merge.
  • Waits until the merge dialog is closed before returning (suitable for use with git mergetool).
  • Suppresses the non-project-file confirmation dialog for files involved in an active merge session.
  • Returns standard exit codes: 0 = resolved, 1 = cancelled, 2 = invalid arguments or fatal error.
Coexists with the bundled idea merge command without replacing it.
